docs.title: Refrigerators
docs.text: Refrigerators are essential kitchen appliances for preserving food. They work by removing heat from the interior and releasing it to the surrounding environment.

docs.title: Types of refrigerators
docs.text:
There are several types of refrigerators:

  • Top freezer
  • Bottom freezer
  • French door
  • Side-by-Side
  • smart models that connect to Wi-Fi.

You can learn more by searching online here.

Important: Always ensure the door is closed properly.

Feature Benefit Energy Star Rating Saves money on electricity bills Adjustable Shelves Customizes storage space Built-in Water Dispenser Provides cool water and ice

Here is a picture of a modern fridge:

docs.title: My Fridge Review
docs.text:
This fridge is very amazing and really very unique. It has a lot of different features that are quite very useful.

Basically, the fridge is kind of big in size and it is able to store many stuff. There are several things which you can put inside, for example: milk, fruits, vegetables and etc.

The user can easily utilize the fridge in order to cool down food items. It is designed in a way that it is very convenient for users.

You should never forget to close the door of the fridge because it might cause issues. There are many reasons why this is important.

The fridge was built by engineers who really did a very good job. It is actually quite incredible.

In conclusion, this fridge is very good and you should totally buy it.

Learn more about reviews

docs.text:

docs.text:
Market Position: Premium.

Service Centers: 2 in Barnaul.

Warranty: ">3 years".

graph LR

B --> C[Samsung : 18%]

D --> E[Others : 22%]

docs.title: Key Considerations
docs.text:
Important

Consider your family size, kitchen space, and budget before choosing.

docs.title: Essential Features
docs.text:
• Capacity: Measured in liters (200-400L for families).

  • Energy Efficiency: Class A+++ is most efficient.

  • Noise Level: Below 40 dB is quiet.

  • Climate Class: N-ST for Barnaul's climate.

docs.title: Popular Capacity Choices
docs.text:
pie title Fridge Capacity Preferences in Barnaul
    "300-400L" : 45
    "200-300L" : 30
    "400L+" : 15

docs.title: Main Categories
docs.text:
Expert Choice

For Barnaul's climate, we recommend No-Frost models for their reliability.

docs.title: 1. Single Door
docs.text:
Best for:

  • Small families (1-2 people).

  • Limited kitchen space.

  • Budget buyerssssss.

Features:

  • Capacity: 150-250L.

  • Price: 15,000-25,000₽.

  • Energy: A+ to A++.

docs.title: 2. Two Door (Top Freezer)
docs.text:
Advantages:

  • Better organization.

  • More affordable than bottom freezer.

  • Energy efficient.

docs.title: 3. Side-by-Side
docs.text:
• Capacity: 350-600L.

  • Features: Water dispenser, ice maker.

  • Price: 40,000-100,000₽.

  • Best for: Large families.

docs.title: Technology Comparison
docs.text:
Direct Cool vs No-FrostInverter Technology Aspect Direct Cool No-Frost Defrosting Manual required Automatic Maintenance High Low Price Lower Higher Efficiency Good Excellent
  • 30-50% less energy,
  • temperature_stability: "±0.5°C precision
  • noise_level: Quieter operation
  • lifespan: Longer compressor life

docs.title: Single Door Refrigerators
docs.text:
Budget Range: 12,000-18,000₽.

  • Brands: Biryusa, Nord.

  • Features: Basic, manual defrost.

  • Energy: B to A+.

Mid-Range: 18,000-25,000₽.

  • Brands: Indesit, Ariston.

  • Features: No-Frost, better insulation.

  • Energy: A+ to A++.
